====={{aniseries|JN}}=====
In ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', [[Wallace]] was revealed to have returned to being the Sootopolis Gym Leader after losing the title of [[Hoenn League]] {{pkmn|Champion}} to {{an|Steven Stone}} sometime prior to ''[[XYS02|Mega Evolution Special II]]'', indicating that Juan is no longer an active Gym Leader.
